# format: html5-dom-v2
# status: active

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html public-id="-//W3C//DTD XHTML 1.0 Transitional//EN" system-id="http://www.w3.org/TR/xhtml1/DTD/xhtml1-transitional.dtd">
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="table" attrs=[]
